name: proseforge-claude
description: Claude Code plugin wrapper for the ProseForge novel workflow. Mirrors the Codex plugin scaffold so the same wrapper scripts power Hermes, Codex, and Claude surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Two-entry Claude Code wrapper for ProseForge.
interface.longDescription: Adds two focused Claude Code skills (nf_pipeline and nf_project) that delegate to the shared local wrapper scripts shipped with the Codex plugin. No MCP required — Claude calls the Python wrappers directly via Bash.
defaultPrompt: Use nf_pipeline to prepare or review a chapter.
Use nf_project to manage slots, outlines, and exports.
